html: θ: Z → X and its (approximate) inverse fψ: X → Z, perturbation scale parameter σ, Dataset X = {x}(i), y(i){N} i=1, hyperparameter k 2 Output: Augmented dataset X̃ = {x̃(i), ỹ(i)}{kN}i=1 3 for i = 1, ..., N do 4 for j = 1, ..., k do 5 z(i) = fψ(x(i)) 6 wj ~ N(0, σ2) 7 X̃ ← {gθ(z(i) + wj), y(i)}
